mapper.select: SELECT md.id as dish_id , name , description , category_id , price , price * coalesce(td.rate, 1) as current_price , image , tag , case when tda.id is null then false else true end has_discount , tda.rate , tda.start_date , tda.end_date FROM public.m_dish md left join t_discount td on md.id = td.dish_id and now()::date between td.start_date and td.end_date left join t_discount tda on md.id = tda.dish_id ORDER BY md.id
